moments.title: The Open Championship begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's final major of the year, tees off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Main Event Kick-off
angles.copy: Golf's biggest names descend on Royal Birkdale! The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Buzz (North West)
angles.copy: Southport is buzzing! The Open Championship arrives at Royal Birkdale tomorrow. Get ready for four days of world-class golf on our doorstep.

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 concludes
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships wrapped up just days ago on July 12th, with the champions crowned at the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club.

angles.name: Highlights Reel
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Wimbledon? The Championships concluded on Sunday, leaving us with some unforgettable moments and new champions. What was your highlight?

angles.name: Looking Back
angles.copy: A week on, we're still thinking about that incredible Wimbledon final! Who was your standout player this year?

moments.title: Luke Hemmings turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist and guitarist of Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday tomorrow.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Big 3-0 for 5 Seconds of Summer's Luke Hemmings tomorrow! What's your favourite 5SOS track to celebrate?

angles.name: Artist Spotlight
angles.copy: From YouTube covers to global pop-rock stardom! Happy 30th to Luke Hemmings. We're playing the best of 5SOS to celebrate!

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Sir Brian May this Sunday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Iconic Musician
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Brian May on his 79th birthday this weekend. From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You,' his legacy is immense.

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Actress and pop superstar Selena Gomez will celebrate her 34th birthday next Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Next Wednesday, we're celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday! What's your go-to Selena track?

angles.name: Birthday Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown to Selena Gomez's 34th birthday is on! Get ready for a week of her biggest hits.

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary lead guitarist, Slash (Saul Hudson), celebrates his 61st birthday next Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're tipping our hats to the iconic Slash, who turns 61! What's your all-time favourite GNR riff?

angles.name: GNR Icon
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain,' Slash's guitar work defined an era. Happy 61st to the legend next week!

moments.title: UK heatwave continues
moments.blurb: An extended period of hot weather is continuing across the UK this week, with southern England potentially seeing temperatures reach 30°C or higher.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Another scorcher of a day across the UK! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool in this continuing hot spell. How are you beating the heat?

angles.name: Local Heat
angles.copy: Devon, it's another warm one! The heatwave continues, with temperatures in the high 20s. Stay safe in the sun!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival live
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is currently underway in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, running from July 15th to 18th.

angles.name: Festival Vibes Scotland
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is bringing incredible music to Stornoway right now! Who's there soaking up the atmosphere?

angles.name: Live Music Spotlight
angles.copy: Fantastic tunes and island vibes! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is in full swing until Saturday. What's been your favourite act so far?

moments.title: Splendour Festival this weekend
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival takes over Wollaton Hall & Deer Park this weekend, running from July 18th to 19th.

angles.name: Weekend Festival Alert
angles.copy: Get ready, Nottingham! Splendour Festival is this weekend at Wollaton Park. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Music Lineup
angles.copy: Big names heading to Nottingham for Splendour Festival this Saturday and Sunday! Perfect weekend plans sorted.

moments.title: Latitude Festival approaches
moments.blurb: Klarna presents Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary next week at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just one week until Latitude Festival turns 20! Henham Park is getting ready for a huge celebration of music, arts, and more.

angles.name: Arts & Culture
angles.copy: Beyond the music, Latitude brings comedy, theatre, and literature to Suffolk next week. Who's heading to the fields?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival next week
moments.blurb: The World's Festival, WOMAD, returns to Neston Park in Wiltshire next week, celebrating global music, arts, dance, food and culture from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: Global Beats Incoming
angles.copy: Get ready for a world of music! WOMAD Festival kicks off in Wiltshire next week. Who's excited for the ultimate cultural experience?

angles.name: Wiltshire Festival
angles.copy: Neston Park is about to get a global makeover! WOMAD Festival brings its incredible lineup of international artists to Wiltshire from July 23rd.

moments.title: Together Again Festival preview
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival will bring music, arts, and culture to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24th to 26th.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Looking for next weekend's plans? Together Again Festival at Bolesworth Castle promises three days of music, arts, and good vibes!

angles.name: Dance & Rewind
angles.copy: From tech house to classic pop anthems, Together Again Festival next weekend has it all! Get ready for the Agora stage and Rewind Arena.
